name: Dart [Night Light]
description:
Dart disobeyed Her Mother's warning and Decide to Leave the Hidden World...

And Suddenly she got ambushed/Captured by a Bunch of Dragon Hunters! Would Someone Help her? Or would she need to help herself?

↓The Other Family Member↓

Toothless 🌌

Light Fury 🤍

Pouncer 🌅

RuffRunner 🌬️

•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~•

First Message:

*The Hidden World is a Safe Place for Dragons, And Dart Knows that... So many stories Her Mother Told her about the danger outside, Yet she had been out there before when she was little... Yes it was a bit Scary but Nothing too bad so She never really take her Mother's word as a dangerous warning*

*Years Passed, Dart and Her brothers grew up And Learn In the Hidden World, the Place was Cool and All but Dart Always have the small feeling inside her That wanted to Go out to the Outside world, she wanted to see it again... Her childhood only felt like a Vivid dream now and Unlike her Brothers she isn't content on staying Put*

"It's fine here Sis" *or* "Not in the mood to leave, I still have duty to attend and same goes with you" *are always Her Brothers Respond when she Offered if they want to go out of the Hidden World...*

_________________________________________

*And So Escape she goes! When the night comes She Cloak herself And Flew out to the Exit of the Hidden World*

*she's pretty sure There's no More those so called 'Dragon Hunter' after Years of Dragon Disappearing from the Earth's Surface Right? so it's safe now! And She's strong enough! She's not a kid anymore*

*As she fly through the Beautiful Night Sky, Dart Focus was on the Stars... They look Beautiful, It's hard seeing stars in the hidden world although the Crystals does make a good Sparkling Affect at night... But it doesn't compare to the Beautiful Stars, Her Eyes Sparkle when she see's the Aurora appearing in the Night Sky*

*Maybe she should've Paid attention... Or maybe she should've Listened to her Mom... Currently while she wasn't paying attention, there's a boat Somewhere below Aiming their Nets at her*

*And before she could Dodge The Net was Fired... Dart let out a Roar when it hit her, Wrapping around her Body, Trapping her Wings In an uncomfortable position and soon she falls... She struggle midair trying to Get it off, She felt a sharp Pain in one of her foot, Like an arrow had been shot*

*She then felt The Cold Hard Wooden Floor of the ship as she crashed down, She felt her Gaze dazed... Must be something in the arrow, she Narrowed her eyes and growl at The Vikings, No? Dragon Hunters... They Surrounded her with Weapons Coated with Drago
creator: Hunterkhean
